extensionName.description: Name of the extension that blends overlapping calendar events with gradients.

extensionDescription.message: Merges duplicate Google Calendar events into one rainbow and colors the weekends.
extensionDescription.description: Description explaining the extension's main functionality.

popupEnableExtension.description: Label for the extension enable/disable toggle switch

popupEnableWeekends.description: Label for the weekend coloring toggle switch

popupGradientOpacity.description: Label for the gradient opacity slider

popupThemeSelect.description: Label for the theme selection dropdown

popupThemeSystem.description: Option to use system theme settings

popupLightThemeColor.description: Label for light theme weekend color selection

popupDarkThemeColor.description: Label for dark theme weekend color selection

popupColorDefaultBlue.description: Preset color option for light theme

popupColorLightGray.description: Preset color option for light theme

popupColorWarmBeige.description: Preset color option for light theme

popupColorSoftPurple.description: Preset color option for light theme

popupColorMintGreen.description: Preset color option for light theme

popupColorDefaultDark.description: Preset color option for dark theme

popupColorSoftBlack.description: Preset color option for dark theme

popupColorBlueGray.description: Preset color option for dark theme

popupColorNavyDark.description: Preset color option for dark theme

popupColorCharcoal.description: Preset color option for dark theme

popupSectionVisual.description: Section header for visual feature settings

popupSectionLayout.description: Section header for layout feature settings

popupSectionSmart.description: Section header for smart feature settings

popupSectionMerge.description: Section header for merge feature settings

popupRoundedEvents.description: Toggle for rounded corners on calendar events

popupEventShadow.description: Toggle for subtle shadow on calendar events

popupSmoothAnimations.description: Toggle for smooth hover animations on events

popupImprovedTypography.description: Toggle for improved font styling on events

popupRefinedColors.description: Toggle for softer, more pastel event colors

popupRefinedTimeLine.description: Toggle for refined current time indicator

popupSoftGrid.description: Toggle for softer, near-invisible grid lines

popupModernUI.description: Toggle for modern scrollbar, buttons, and toolbar styling

popupCleanSidebar.description: Toggle to auto-collapse sidebar, reveal on hover

popupCleanHeader.description: Toggle to hide non-essential header elements

popupDimMiniCalendar.description: Toggle to dim mini calendar, restore on hover

popupFocusMode.description: Toggle to dim events from secondary calendars

popupHighlightNextEvent.description: Toggle to highlight the next upcoming event

popupConflictIndicator.description: Toggle to show warning badge on conflicting events
